comment: Curadoria de userscripts de TERCEIROS (hibrido: instalam do original, auto-update do autor). Importado do export Tampermonkey v11.1. Remova as linhas que nao quer publicar; rode `node build.mjs` pra atualizar a pagina.

scripts.name: Auto click bonus points on Twitch.tv
scripts.desc: Auto clicking "Click to claim a bonus" under the chat

scripts.name: Better XVideos.com
scripts.desc: Always expand video to large size, scroll down to video, use w a s d to rotate video, q e ` 1 2 3 4 5 z x to seek, v V to frame advance, allow seeking to 0:00, allow clicking anywhere to start video, infinite volume up and down - 2025-05-30, 14:44

scripts.name: Bypass Link Redirects
scripts.desc: Automatically bypasses intermediate confirmation, warning, and interstitial pages on supported websites, taking you directly to the destination link.

scripts.name: Bypass Paywalls Clean - es/pt/south america
scripts.desc: Bypass Paywalls of news sites

scripts.name: Erome Age Warn Skipper
scripts.desc: Skips the age warning automatically

scripts.name: MissAV Enhanced Assistant
scripts.desc: Remove ads | Background play | Auto play | Custom fast-forward time | Full title | More

scripts.name: Nhentai - Infinite Scroll 2.0 (Svelte Rebirth)
scripts.desc: Completely replaces DyKx0V's original script due to Nhentai rebuilding their site using Svelte.

scripts.name: Nhentai Plus+
scripts.desc: Enhances the functionality of Nhentai website.

scripts.desc: Automatically sets the PornHub player to Wide, and scrolls to it

scripts.name: PornHub Plus
scripts.desc: A kinder PornHub. Because you're worth it.

scripts.name: Pornhub Pro-ish
scripts.desc: Adds a menu with to apply filters, add sorting, player tweaks like hiding the cursor and auto-mute, and site-wide quality-of-life improvements like automatic age verification and always default to the english version of the site. Beta download button added! Actively maintained and used by me so updated regularly. Feel free to request features!

scripts.name: Pure Fun – Pornhub Video Downloader
scripts.desc: Pornhub video download with one click | pornhub.com | Download directly without login | Download free to watch paid videos | Download videos that are prohibited | Download all viewable resolutions

scripts.name: Pure Twitter (X) Age Bypass
scripts.desc: Fastest and lightest age verification bypass for X (Twitter)

scripts.name: Scribd Bypass
scripts.desc: Skip Scribd for its free counterpart and download any file.

scripts.name: Spankbang AV Bypass
scripts.desc: Overwrites cookies for Spankbang domains to make it think you're from the United States. Bypassing verification of all types, including challenges and real ID verification.

scripts.name: SpankBang UI Enhancer Pro (Ultimate Edition)
scripts.desc: Ultimate UI-Cleanup: Removes Overlays, Blur, Lock-Icons, and Hover-Restrictions.

scripts.name: TrueTheaterMode - twitch.tv
scripts.desc: Removes the small black bar that appears under the twitch player in theatre mode

scripts.name: Twitch - Disable automatic video downscale
scripts.desc: Disables the automatic downscaling of Twitch streams while tabbed away

scripts.name: Twitch UI Cleaner (NO ADs)
scripts.desc: A minimal Twitch cleaner that works across all Twitch pages.

scripts.name: Twitch.tv chat Translation (Optimized Auto)
scripts.desc: Add a button to the Twitch.tv website that opens a menu to translate messages to the Twitch.tv chat. Auto-start translation.

scripts.name: Twitch.tv Frontpage Autoplay Off
scripts.desc: Pauses Twitch.tv frontpage carousel video that autoplays recommended streams. Check GitHub page for the demonstration image.

scripts.name: TwitchAdSolutions (vaft)
scripts.desc: Multiple solutions for blocking Twitch ads (vaft)
